mapper.sql: SELECT tool_id, tool_name, display_name, description, server_name, server_url, sse_endpoint, protocol, category, version, owner_team, owner_user_id, required_permission, tenant_ids, dept_ids, status, audit_enabled, marketplace_visible, approval_required, input_schema, output_schema, example_usage, tags, release_notes, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time FROM ai_mcp_tool_registry
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_mcp_tool_registry (tool_name, display_name, description, server_name, server_url, sse_endpoint, protocol, category, version, owner_team, owner_user_id, required_permission, tenant_ids, dept_ids, status, audit_enabled, marketplace_visible, approval_required, input_schema, output_schema, example_usage, tags, release_notes, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) VALUES (#{toolName}, #{displayName}, #{description}, #{serverName}, #{serverUrl}, #{sseEndpoint}, #{protocol}, #{category}, #{version}, #{ownerTeam}, #{ownerUserId}, #{requiredPermission}, #{tenantIds}, #{deptIds}, #{status}, #{auditEnabled}, #{marketplaceVisible}, #{approvalRequired}, #{inputSchema}, #{outputSchema}, #{exampleUsage}, #{tags}, #{releaseNotes}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime})
